explainers: 1 Tier-1 competitor move in priority markets
headline: Xero × Anthropic deal signals platform-AI baseline rising; Sage and MYOB respond.
why_it_moved: Score moved because: 1 Tier-1 competitor move in priority markets

competitors.headline: Xero strikes multi-year deal with Anthropic to embed Claude across the platform
competitors.summary: Xero announced a multi-year partnership with Anthropic to bring Claude into the Xero platform — invoice follow-ups, financial report prep, and data-secure analysis from inside Xero. Sets a new baseline for AI-native accounting workflows and pressures every competitor to follow.
